findings.message: CLAUDE.md refers to the utility agent as 'refactor-agent' but agents/utility/refactor-agent.md declares name: code-refactorer-agent; any call using the CLAUDE.md name will fail
CLAUDE.md defines Gate 2 threshold as 80%; spec-orchestrator defines it as 85%; agent-workflow.md collapses all gates into a single 95% threshold — three incompatible models in one system

CLAUDE.md documents --quality, --skip-agent, --phase, and --language flags for /agent-workflow but none of these are parsed in commands/agent-workflow.md; the command accepts only a raw $ARGUMENTS string
CLAUDE.md shows 'cp agents/* .claude/agents/' but agents are in subdirectories; the glob will copy directory names not contents; the correct form is 'cp -r agents/* .claude/agents/'
Agent frontmatter has no model field; system default model will be used instead of an intentional tier choice
Agent has zero usage or invocation example blocks; only implementation code templates are present, not examples showing how to invoke or what to expect from the agent
Agent frontmatter has no model field
No usage or invocation example blocks; the agent body contains framework reference YAML but no examples of agent invocation or expected output
No explicit output format section; the agent has a Key Success Metrics section but no defined deliverable schema for what it produces
Agent frontmatter has no model field despite declaring other metadata like category and auto_activate
No invocation example blocks; the agent documents output artifacts thoroughly but does not show how to invoke it or what a complete interaction looks like
Agent frontmatter has no model field
No invocation example blocks
Agent frontmatter has no model field
No usage or invocation example blocks; code implementation patterns are present but not agent invocation examples
No explicit output format section; agent describes implementation approach but not the deliverable schema
Agent frontmatter has no model field
No invocation example blocks; the workflow framework templates are present but no example shows how to invoke the orchestrator
Agent frontmatter has no model field
No invocation example blocks
High vague-quantifier density: 'comprehensive' x3, 'detailed' x2, 'actionable', 'clear' each contributing -2; total -14 approaching the -20 cap
Agent frontmatter has no model field
Vague quantifiers: 'appropriate' x2, 'proper', 'comprehensive', 'significant' — each -2, total -10
Agent frontmatter has no model field
Vague quantifiers: 'comprehensive' x3, 'appropriate', 'rigorous' — each -2, total -10
Agent frontmatter has no model field
Only one substantive example (the validation report template); no invocation example showing how to call the agent
Vague quantifiers: 'comprehensive' x2, 'appropriate', 'thorough' x2, 'actionable' — each -2, total -12
Agent frontmatter has no model field
Agent frontmatter has no tools field; agent cannot read existing design files or write output documents in production; registration defaults to conversation-only mode
Agent frontmatter has no model field
No explicit output format section; the agent describes its analysis process but does not define the schema of refactoring proposals it produces
NotebookEdit is declared in tools but the agent body makes no reference to Jupyter notebooks or notebook editing in its workflow
Command frontmatter is missing the required name field; only description and allowed-tools are present, so the slash command cannot be registered or invoked by name

Command uses $ARGUMENTS as the feature description but provides no guard or user prompt for the empty-arguments case; invoking /agent-workflow with no text starts the full chain with no feature description
Command frontmatter is missing the required name field; only description and allowed-tools are present, so the slash command cannot be registered or invoked by name
